description.ko: 보이지 않는 심연의 조석이 별먼지와 보랏빛 성운을 무한한 어둠의 평면으로 조용히 밀어붙입니다.
description.en: An unseen abyssal tide presses star dust and violet nebula into a silent plane of infinite darkness.

prompt: VOID-3 Cosmic Deep: a horizonless deep space nebula compressed by an unseen abyssal tide, where a vast tilted sheet of pure #0D0221 darkness cuts silently across the starfield like a lightless cosmic ocean seen edge-on. Above the dark plane, layered #3D1A78 ultraviolet vapor hangs in broad, bruised bands; below it, dense #E6E6FA star dust gathers into suspended shoals and thin luminous sediment, each particle drifting with extremely slow tidal motion. Faint #7B68EE lavender filaments crawl only along stress fractures at the boundary, revealing pressure from something immeasurable outside perception. No planets, spacecraft, rings, vortex, central black hole, lattice, or chasm; the scene should feel like a forbidden astronomical exposure of infinite space being flattened into silence. Mysterious cosmic horror majesty, high particle density, restrained lavender glow, cold volumetric haze, ultra-detailed astrophotographic texture, solemn abyssal scale.
